html:
Exclusive to:

Mushy Cake is a Crock Pot recipe exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is made of 1 Moon Shroom, 1 Red Cap, 1 Green Cap and 1 Blue Cap. All ingredients need to be raw. Any recipe without the four different mushrooms will result in Ratatouille.

Eating a Mushy Cake will increase sleep resistance from 10 to 33.3 seconds for 1 day and gives full grogginess immunity for a short period of time.

Recipe

Trivia

  • The Mushy Cake was introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.
  • The Mushy Cake and Grim Galette are the only dishes in that have only one possible recipe.
  • Wendy's quote is likely a reference to the Super Mushroom and Mini Mushroom from the Super Mario series, the former making Mario grow in size and the latter, shrinking him. It could also be in part a reference to Alice in Wonderland's 'Eat Me' cake and 'Drink Me' potion.
  • Despite her quote, Wigfrid can eat Mushy Cake without issue.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

“It lives up to its name.”
–Wilson
“Cake's cake, pass it here.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will eat whole cake!”
–Wolfgang
“Will it make me grow? Or shrink perhaps? Mushrooms are funny things.”
–Wendy
“REQUIRES LITTLE MASTICATION. EXTREMELY EFFICIENT”
–WX-78
“I don't believe that qualifies as a "cake" dear.”
–Wickerbottom
“Mushy in more ways than one, eh?”
–Woodie

–Maxwell
“A Viking wöuld never stöop tö eat such an unwörthy thing.”
–Wigfrid
“Hey, this isn't real cake!”
–Webber
“It certainly has a unique flavor profile.”
–Warly
“Squishy”
–Wormwood
“Aw c'mon, it's not that bad.”
–Winona
“There's no room in my stomach, I'm afraid.”
–Wortox
“Is best cake ever!”
–Wurt
“Is that really a cake?”
–Walter
“If it's a cake it can't be too terrible... right?”
–Wanda
Mushy Cake is a Crock Pot recipe exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is made of 1 Moon Shroom, 1 Red Cap, 1 Green Cap and 1 Blue Cap. All ingredients need to be raw. Any recipe without the four different mushrooms will result in Ratatouille.
Eating a Mushy Cake will increase sleep resistance from 10 to 33.3 seconds for 1 day and gives full grogginess immunity for a short period of time.
Recipe[edit | edit source]
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Mushy Cake was introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.
The Mushy Cake and Grim Galette are the only dishes in that have only one possible recipe.
Wendy's quote is likely a reference to the Super Mushroom and Mini Mushroom from the Super Mario series, the former making Mario grow in size and the latter, shrinking him. It could also be in part a reference to Alice in Wonderland's 'Eat Me' cake and 'Drink Me' potion.
Despite her quote, Wigfrid can eat Mushy Cake without issue.

'''Mushy Cake''' is a [[Crock Pot]] recipe exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is made of 1 [[Moon Shroom]], 1 [[Red Cap]], 1 [[Green Cap]] and 1 [[Blue Cap]]. All ingredients need to be raw. Any recipe without the four different mushrooms will result in [[Ratatouille]].

Eating a Mushy Cake will increase [[Grogginess|sleep resistance]] from 10 to 33.3 seconds for 1 [[day]] and gives full grogginess immunity for a short period of time.

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Moon Shroom
|item2 = Red Cap
|item3 = Blue Cap
|item4 = Green Cap
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Mushy Cake
}}

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}}Trivia ==
* The Mushy Cake was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Forgotten Knowledge|Forgotten Knowledge]]'' update.
*The Mushy Cake and [[Grim Galette]] are the only dishes in {{DST|24}} that have only one possible recipe.
*Wendy's quote is likely a reference to the Super Mushroom and Mini Mushroom from the [https://www.mariowiki.com/Super_Mario_(series) ''Super Mario'' series], the former making Mario grow in size and the latter, shrinking him. It could also be in part a reference to ''Alice in Wonderland''<nowiki/>'s 'Eat Me' cake and 'Drink Me' potion.
*Despite her quote, [[Wigfrid]] can eat Mushy Cake without issue.
{{clear}}
